name: SSIS
description: This Test Connection validates the access against the server and basic metadata extraction of pipelines.

steps.name: CheckAccess
steps.description: Check if the database is reachable to fetch the DAG details. Skipped in file-only mode (no databaseConnection configured).
steps.errorMessage: Failed to connect to SSIS database. If running in file-only mode, databaseConnection is not required.

steps.name: SSISDBExist
steps.description: Check if the SSISDB database exists and is accessible. Skipped in file-only mode (no databaseConnection configured).
steps.errorMessage: SSISDB database does not exist or is not accessible.

steps.name: SSISDBProjectsExist
steps.description: Check if there are any projects present in the SSISDB database. Skipped in file-only mode.
steps.errorMessage: No projects found in SSISDB database.

steps.name: SSISDBPackagesExist
steps.description: Check if there are any packages present in the SSISDB database. Skipped in file-only mode.
steps.errorMessage: No packages found in SSISDB database.

steps.name: CheckLocalPath
steps.description: Check that the local projects path exists and contains at least one .dtsx package file. Only applies when packageConnection is a local path.
steps.errorMessage: Local projects path is missing or contains no .dtsx package files.

steps.name: CheckS3Access
steps.errorMessage: Unable to connect to storage service
